summary: Completed testing of P1 and P2 features for Seraph AI. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (VNS Alerts, Browser Extension, Setup Guide) load correctly with all expected components. SOAR templates correctly show 14 templates (6 original + 8 new). Multi-tenant service functions properly. Navigation updated with all new items.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - minor recharts sizing issue during initial render (known issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: GET /api/advanced/alerts/status - VNS alerts status returns correct structure (enabled, slack_configured, email_configured, stats)
POST /api/advanced/alerts/configure - VNS alerts configuration endpoint works
GET /api/soar/templates - Returns 14 templates (6 original + 8 new P2 templates)
GET /api/soar/templates/categories - Returns all expected categories including email_security, advanced_threats, network, identity, vulnerability, cloud_security
GET /api/advanced/quantum/status - Returns quantum security status with mode=simulation and algorithms (KYBER, DILITHIUM)
Multi-Tenant Service - create_tenant() creates tenant with correct tier
Multi-Tenant Service - get_tenant_stats() returns correct stats
Multi-Tenant Service - TIER_QUOTAS correctly configured for all tiers
GET /api/advanced/dashboard - Returns all advanced service data (mcp, memory, vns, quantum, ai)
GET /api/advanced/sandbox/status - Cuckoo sandbox status endpoint works
GET /api/advanced/vns/stats - VNS stats endpoint returns data
Frontend - VNS Alerts page loads with Slack/Email/Settings tabs
Frontend - Browser Extension page loads with 6 feature cards and 5 code tabs
Frontend - Setup Guide page loads with Cuckoo and Quantum sections
Frontend - Sidebar navigation contains VNS Alerts, Browser Extension, Setup Guide items

quantum_status.note: Simulation mode active - Install liboqs for production quantum crypto

multi_tenant.note: Service layer only - not yet integrated into API routes per agent context

multi_tenant_architecture.note: Service layer implemented, API integration pending

seed_data_creation: Created test tenant 'Test Tenant P2' during multi-tenant service testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 and P2 features working: 1) VNS Alerting Pipeline - UI at /vns-alerts with Slack/Email tabs, API at /api/advanced/alerts/status and /api/advanced/alerts/configure. 2) Browser Extension page at /browser-extension with 6 features and 5 code tabs. 3) Setup Guide at /setup-guide with Cuckoo Sandbox and liboqs installation instructions. 4) SOAR has 14 templates now (8 new: phishing, APT, lateral movement, privilege escalation, zero-day, supply chain, DNS tunneling, cloud breach). 5) Multi-tenant service provides tenant CRUD, quota management, feature gating - service layer only, not yet exposed via API routes. 6) Quantum security running in simulation mode. All new sidebar nav items present.
